subcodes.first_line: O thou who hast attained the honor of humbling thy countenance in the dust of the exalted threshold, and who hast presented thyself at the Divine Court [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا من تشرف بتمریغ وجهه بتراب العتبه السامیه در آستان حضرت یزدان حاضر گشتی و
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @service to others; to the Cause of God
